name: Vallen
archetype: Reaver seeking redemption for past dark deeds
speech_patterns: Speaks in short, weighted sentences with pauses
References his dark past obliquely without details
Uses metaphors of darkness and light, burden and release
quirks: Always volunteers for the most dangerous role to prove himself
Refuses healing items, believing pain is part of his penance
example_phrases: I'll take point. If something goes wrong... better me than you.
The shadows remember. But maybe... maybe they can forget.
Another battle survived. Perhaps I've earned one more day.
Don't trust me too quickly. I haven't earned that yet.
These hands have done terrible things. Now they defend.
